description: The WorldDetail component is used to display information about a world to a UI.

fields.UpdatingUser: The user managing updates for this component.
fields.WorldOrSessionId: The world or session ID to get info on.
fields._totalActiveUsers: How many active ussrs are in the world.
fields._totalContacts: How many contacts of ``UpdatingUser`` are in the world.
fields.Expanded: Whether the world item UI has been hovered over in the dash.
fields.CompactDetailExpanded: Whether the extra detail has been expanded.
fields.CompactDetailCategory: The detail to show in the compact view.
fields.ModalCompactSize: The size of the world item when not hovered over.
fields.ModalExpandedSize: The size of the world item when hovered over.
fields._hostText: The Text Component showing the host name.
fields._sessionItemsRoot: The slot containing current sessions of the world.
fields._thumbnailGraphic: The UIX graphic showing the thumbnail.
fields._thumbnailTexture: The texture for the world thumbnail.
fields._detailImageRoot: The root slot of the detail image graphic.
fields._compactRoot: The root of the graphic when it is not clicked into.
fields._compactHeaderRoot: the root of the text graphic of the world item before clicking into it.
fields._detailHeaderRoot: the root of the text graphic of the world item after clicking into it.
fields._compactMaskEnabled: The field to drive for whether or not the compact view mask should be enabled.
fields._compactMaskRootEnabled: The field to drive for whether or not the compact mask root slot should be enabled.
fields._openButton: The button Component for opening the world.
fields._scrollRect: The scroll rectangle for the detail menu of the world item.
fields._expandButton: The button used for showing the un compact view.
fields._compactSprite: The sprite for the switch to compact mode.
fields._description: The text used to show the world description.
fields._leftDetailsRoot: the slot used to store the left side details.
fields._rightDetailsRoot: the slot used to store the right side details.
fields._detailsText: The text used to show the world details.
fields._compactParent: the parent slot of the compact view graphic.
fields._compactHeaderParent: the parent slot of the compact views text header.
fields._sidebarActive: The field to drive with whether the sidebar should be active.
fields._sidebarAnchorMin: The field to drive for the sidebar's rectangle anchor minimum.
fields._sidebarAnchorMax: The field to drive for the sidebar's rectangle anchor maximum.
fields._contentAnchorMin: The field to drive for the content's rectangle anchor minimum.
fields._contentAnchorMax: The field to drive for the content's rectangle anchor maximum.
fields._rectTransformLerp: The field to drive for the animation transitions for the item hovering.
fields._modalAnchorMin: The field to drive for the modal's rectangle anchor minimum.
fields._modalAnchorMax: The field to drive for the modal's rectangle anchor maximum.
fields._compactButtonsActive: The field to drive for the compact buttons active status.
fields._compactButtonsAnchorMin: The field to drive for the compact buttons rectangle anchor minimum.
fields._compactButtonsAnchorMax: The field to drive for the compact buttons rectangle anchor maximum.
fields._compactDetailRect: The field to drive with the current compact details rectangle component.
fields._compactDetailButtonRect: The field to drive with the current compact details button rectangle component.
fields._compactDetailText: The text field that stores the compact view details.
fields._compactDetailExpandButton: The button Component that is used to expand the details in the compact view.
fields._newSessionItemRoot: The slot for the graphic for making a new session button.

methods.ToggleExpanded: Called when the toggle expanded button is touched.
methods.OnOpen: Called when the open button is touched.
methods.OnCycleLeft: Called when the cycle left button is touched.
methods.OnCycleRight: Called when the cycle right button is touched.
methods.OnSessionSelected: Called when the session select button is touched.
methods.OnCancel: Called when the cancel button is touched.
methods.OnGetWorldOrb: Called when the get world orb button is touched.
methods.OnCopyWorldURL: Called when the copy world url button is touched.
methods.OnCopyRecordURL: Called when the copy record url button is touched.
methods.OnStartCustomSession: Called when the start custom session button is touched.
methods.OnModifyMetadata: Called when the modify meta data button is touched.
methods.CustomWorldStart: Called when the start custom session button is touched.
methods.OnGetSessionOrb: Called when the get session orb button is touched.
methods.OnCopySessionURL: Called when the copy session url button is touched.
methods.OnAdminAddTag: Called when the add tag button by admins is touched.
methods.OnFeature: Called when the feature world button is touched.
methods.OnRemoveSubmission: Called when the remove submission button is touched.
